case_title: JANET PICKENS STANFORD VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY STANFORD, JANET PICKENS AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD, JANET PICKENS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JAN-16-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANFORD, JANET PICKENS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK PLAINTIFF WAS EITHER OVERDRAWN OR HAD NON SUFFICIENT FUNDS WHEN ELECTRONIC CHECKS WERE PRESENTED. JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK
